title: God Sword
description: Adds a custom OP sword crafted from end-game items
body:
## Overview

The God Sword, said to be a long forgotten heavenly weapon that is capable of harnessing raw energy and willpower.
Forging this weapon could truly turn the tables, although it's unstable nature could lead to unwanted consequences.

This small project was born from inspiration several years ago and uploaded onto Planet Minecraft, where I am just now uploading it here :)

## Detailed Description


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **Crafting**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Adds a sword craftable with an end rod, 2 netherite ingots, a nether star and an enchanted golden apple.

</details>



### **Sword Powers﻿**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The sword is unstable, crafted with power that is hard to contain. Once held, it will explode in a burst of energy, launching nearby enemies into the air and making them glow. This happens every time you equip the sword with a 2 minute cooldown.

When held, fire resistance, strength 2, speed 2 and conduit power.

Sneaking will summon a lightning bolt in front of you (5 second cooldown).

Sprinting leaves behind a trail of fire (let me know if you would like this removed / toggleable in-game).

</details>



### **Advancements**
A new advancement is added called 'Heavenly Weapon'. This advancement is obtainable when someone crafts and obtains the God Sword for the first time. It grants you 100 experience points (7 and a half levels from 0).

NOTE: Cannot be obtained from receiving the item, it must be crafted (no, killing someone and obtaining it from them won't grant you the achievement).

### **Creative Commands**

```
/function cool:givesword
```
 --> Give you the God Sword


```
/reload
```
 --> Reloads the world and all datapacks (useful if you added your datapack while you are already in your world), also confirms in chat whether or not the datapack has successfully loaded.

</details>
